title: MrChair1's Skin Changer
body:
# 🎨 MrChair1's Skin Changer

# ⚠ IMPORTANT: For people who used older versions (1.6.0 and older):

In the newer version of the mod (1.6.1) the ```skins/``` folder is moved to the ```.minecraft/MrChair1sSkinChangerMod/``` directory, to not clutter your .minecraft/ directory and to make the mod more organized.

## ✨ Features
- **Instant Updates:** Change your skin in real-time without restarting the game.
- **Multiplayer Sync:** Play with friends! If they have the mod, they will see your custom skin, and you will see theirs.
- **Dual Model Support:** Full support for both **Wide (Steve)** and **Slim (Alex)** models.
- **HD Skin Support: Supports standard 64x64 skins and high-definition 128x128 skins.**
- **Safety First: Includes checks to prevent loading massive files that could crash the game.**
- **Simple GUI:**
> - 🔍 **Search Bar:** Quickly find skins by name.
> - 🟢 **Active Indicator:** Clearly see which skin is currently equipped with a green diamond (◆).
> - 👕 **Live Preview:** See a preview of the skin before you apply it.

<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube-nocookie.com/embed/Cwr1m_ugI2k" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" allowfullscreen></iframe>

## 🚀 How to Use
- **Open the Menu:** Press **K** in-game to open the Skin Changer menu.
_(Note: You can change this keybind in your Control settings, or access the menu via the Config button if you use the Mod Menu mod.)_
- **Add Your Skins:**
> - Click the **"Open Skins Folder"** button inside the menu.
> - This opens the skins folder (located in your ```.minecraft/MrChair1sSkinChangerMod/``` directory).
> - Drop your **Classic (Wide)** skins directly into this folder.
> - Drop your **Slim (Alex)** skins into the ```slim/``` subfolder.
- **Select & Apply & Enjoy: click your desired skin from the list and apply it!**
## 📦 Compatibility
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.1
- **Loader:** Fabric
- **Multiplayer:** ✅ 
_(Note: For other players to see your skin, the server must have the mod installed to relay the data, and other players need the mod installed to receive it.)_
### 🔴🧾Feel free to leave feedback in the comments!
